title: tonningia lanata
intro: Tonningia lanata, also known as the woolly Tonningia, is a plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tonningia lanata include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in traditional medicine to manage fever and reduce inflammation. Tonningia lanata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
